description: Get dressed in these clogs from catwalk for a wonderful casual look. The cut-outs on these slip-ons lend a dose of chic to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Leather uppers for durability and comfort Cutouts for added style and ventilation Stitch detailing and applique elements for added style Midsole Synthetic leather covered footbed for added style and durability Outsole Ergonomic TPU outsole with a heel for extra comfort Floral grooves and textured surfaces for added grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
